# QA Plan: Phase 3 Hero Migration — Batch 1
**Date**: 2026-05-18
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 5 stories (S6-03..S6-07) across Phase 3 hero migration epic
**Engine**: Unity 2022.3.62f1
**Sprint File**: [production/sprints/sprint-006.md](../sprints/sprint-006.md)
**Epic File**: [production/epics/phase-3-hero-migration/EPIC.md](../epics/phase-3-hero-migration/EPIC.md)

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|------------------------|------------------------------|
| S6-03 Horus | Integration | EditMode (optional, AC #8) — `Assets/UnitTests/TestEditMode/HorusSlotBindingTests.cs` | Console log inspection + multipeer Pass #1-5 + 1-match Training + BUG-0001 cousin verify (HorusE/HorusR) |
| S6-04 Volund | Integration | EditMode (optional) — `VolundSlotBindingTests.cs` | Same shape; BUG-0001 cousin verify (VolundW) + VolundW pattern audit (AC #8) |
| S6-05 Guan Yu | Integration | EditMode (optional) — `GuanYuSlotBindingTests.cs` + companion file audit | Same shape; BUG-0001 cousin verify (GuanYuE) + GuanYuN-action TD-006 cousin gate (AC #6) + sub-system pattern note |
| S6-06 Skadi | Integration | EditMode (optional) — `SkadiSlotBindingTests.cs` | Same shape; velocity baseline note (AC #7) — log actual elapsed time |
| S6-07 Batch gate | Integration | None (playtest-driven) | Combined multipeer harness Pass #1-5 across 4 heroes + 1-match Training per hero + go/no-go for batch 2 planning |

**Classification note:** All stories are "Integration" primary because the proof-of-correctness is **Editor Console log evidence + multipeer harness output**, not pure-formula unit tests. Pattern replacements (A-D) are mechanical 1-line edits — most testable by absence of warnings/errors in Console + parity log, not by isolated unit tests. AC #8 ("EditMode tests... optional in batch 1") confirms this — per-hero unit tests are advisory, not blocking.

---

## Automated Tests (OPTIONAL for batch 1)

Per AC #8 across S6-03..06, EditMode tests are **optional** in batch 1 — the 116-test `Radius.Tests.Characters` assembly transitively covers slot-binding helpers. Batch 2+ should consider a per-hero test class convention.

If implementing optional EditMode tests:

**Test file pattern**: `Assets/UnitTests/TestEditMode/[Hero]SlotBindingTests.cs`

**What to test**:
- `IsActiveSlotOwner(slot)` returns true when `BoundSlot == slot && Behavior.HasInputAuthority`
- `IsInputSlotMatch(input, slot)` returns true when `input.PressedSlot == slot`
- `IsQuickCastForBoundSlot()` returns expected quickcast flag from CBSUnit `IsQuickCast(slot)`
- `MaxRank <= 1` guard (Pattern D) for non-rank abilities
- Dual-path fallback: `BoundSlot == 0` path returns legacy SkillKey-shaped data

**Edge cases**:
- `BoundSlot == 0` (legacy / pre-bind window) — fallback path
- `BoundSlot != 0` but `Slots.TryGet(slot, out var) == false` (orphan bind)
- Multipeer authority check: server-side vs client-side behavior

**Estimated test count**: ~6-8 unit tests per hero (skip for batch 1 unless first-mover sets convention)

---

## Manual QA Checklist (PRIMARY for batch 1)

The bulk of batch 1 verification is manual — Console log inspection + multipeer harness output + 1-match playthrough.

### S6-03 Horus
**Verification method**: Console log scrape + multipeer harness output + 1-match Training playthrough + BUG-0001 cousin screen recording
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer (self) + qa-tester (manual playthrough)
**Evidence**:
- `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` — append Horus section (per-ability checklist + sign-off)
- `production/qa/evidence/S6-03-multipeer.txt` — Pass #1-5 log
- PR description: pattern A-D count pre/post + hardcoded SkillKey count
- (Optional) Screen recording of HorusE + HorusR cast for BUG-0001 cousin verification

Checklist:
- [ ] Code audit complete — 5 Horus action files scanned for `SkillKey.X` / hardcoded slot literals / `Combat.SkillN` direct reads; counts recorded in PR description
- [ ] Pattern A-D replacements applied where code shape matches; dual-path fallback retained for `BoundSlot == 0`
- [ ] `scene_game_map.unity` Console: **0** `BindSlot not registered` warnings on Horus spawn (TD-007 guard)
- [ ] `scene_game_map.unity` Console: **0** `[S5-06] StateReleaseSlot ... slot=0` warnings during Q/W/E/R + I cast (TD-006 guard)
- [ ] Multipeer harness Pass #1-5 green: parity ✅, bandwidth ≤65 B/s
- [ ] 1-match Training: Q + W + E + R + I + Normal Attack + Recall + Item all functional, no S1/S2 bugs
- [ ] BUG-0001 cousin (HorusE + HorusR): cast both, observe AnimatorStateSync. If locomotion re-engages cleanly post-cast → mark `CLOSED-BY-SIDE-EFFECT` in BUG-0001.md addendum. If residual stuck-animation → file BUG-0005-style follow-up

### S6-04 Volund
**Verification method**: Same as S6-03; emphasis on VolundW (largest action 118 lines)
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-tester
**Evidence**:
- Append to `sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` (Volund section)
- `production/qa/evidence/S6-04-multipeer.txt`
- PR description: pattern counts pre/post + VolundW size analysis

Checklist:
- [ ] Code audit complete; **expect highest hardcoded-SkillKey count of batch 1** (confirm or refute in PR)
- [ ] Pattern A-D replacements applied; dual-path fallback retained
- [ ] BindSlot warnings: 0
- [ ] StateReleaseSlot slot=0 warnings: 0
- [ ] Multipeer Pass #1-5 green, bandwidth ≤65 B/s
- [ ] 1-match Training: 5 abilities + NA + Recall + Item functional
- [ ] BUG-0001 cousin (VolundW): cast W, observe animation. Mark CLOSED or file BUG-XXXX
- [ ] **VolundW-specific gate**: confirm no new pattern beyond A-D introduced. If new shape → document as Pattern 6 candidate in `phase-2-lessons-learned.md`

### S6-05 Guan Yu
**Verification method**: Same + 2 companion files (`GuanYuWOnHit.cs`, `RotateGO.cs`) audit + TD-006 cousin gate for N-action
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-tester
**Evidence**:
- Append to `sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` (Guan Yu section)
- `production/qa/evidence/S6-05-multipeer.txt`
- PR description: action + companion file audit findings + explicit N-action path verification note

Checklist:
- [ ] Code audit complete — 6 root action files **+ 2 companion files** (`GuanYuWOnHit.cs`, `RotateGO.cs`)
- [ ] Pattern A-D applied where applicable in action + companion files
- [ ] BindSlot warnings: 0
- [ ] StateReleaseSlot slot=0 warnings: 0 on Q/W/E/R + I + N
- [ ] Multipeer Pass #1-5 green, bandwidth ≤65 B/s
- [ ] 1-match Training: 6 abilities + Normal Attack + Recall + Item functional
- [ ] BUG-0001 cousin (GuanYuE): cast E, mark CLOSED or file BUG-XXXX
- [ ] **TD-006 cousin gate (AC #6)**: confirm `GuanYuNAction` Normal Attack auto-target flow routes through `Progress` setter (S5-21 fix applies); no slot-binding bypass
- [ ] (Optional) AC #9: if W/, R/ sub-system pattern is unique to GuanYu → append 1-paragraph note to `phase-2-lessons-learned.md` as Phase 3 sub-pattern candidate

### S6-06 Skadi (CONTROL CASE)
**Verification method**: Same shape, simpler — clean baseline
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-tester
**Evidence**:
- Append to `sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` (Skadi section, **with velocity baseline note**)
- `production/qa/evidence/S6-06-multipeer.txt`
- PR description: pattern counts (expect baseline-low) + velocity note

Checklist:
- [ ] Code audit complete — 5 Skadi action files; **expect lowest hardcoded-SkillKey count of batch 1**
- [ ] Pattern A-D applied where applicable
- [ ] BindSlot warnings: 0
- [ ] StateReleaseSlot slot=0 warnings: 0
- [ ] Multipeer Pass #1-5 green, bandwidth ≤65 B/s
- [ ] 1-match Training: 5 abilities + NA + Recall + Item functional
- [ ] **Velocity baseline (AC #7)**: actual elapsed time (story start → close) logged in evidence doc. If ≥0.6d → flag in S6 retro as estimate-update signal

### S6-07 Batch 1 Playtest Gate
**Verification method**: Combined multipeer harness run + 4 × 1-match Training (one per migrated hero) + go/no-go decision for batch 2
**Who must sign off**: gameplay-programmer + qa-tester + producer (go/no-go)
**Evidence**:
- `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` — final "Batch 1 complete" section with combined sign-off + go/no-go verdict for batch 2
- (Optional) Combined screen recording of all 4 heroes cycling through Q/W/E/R sequence

Checklist:
- [ ] All 4 heroes from S6-03..06 closed with evidence sections appended
- [ ] Combined multipeer harness run: load each hero, Pass #1-5 green for all 4
- [ ] Combined Training match: play all 4 heroes in sequence (or 4 separate matches), all abilities functional
- [ ] No regressions surfaced in Hercules during batch 1 work (control hero)
- [ ] **BUG-0008 surveillance step**: during multipeer combined run, use **Teleport Ticket** item (`item_teleport_to_unit.prefab`) on at least one hero with a 2nd peer connected. Verify post-teleport movement input works and animator transitions out of Idle. If movement stays frozen or animator locks Idle → escalate BUG-0008 to active Sprint 006 fix (gameplay-programmer + network-programmer); document in `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` regardless of outcome
- [ ] **Batch 2 readiness**: if velocity ≥1.0×/day from S6-06 baseline → S6-11/S6-12 stretch unlocks. If <1.0×/day → defer to S7
- [ ] Go/no-go for batch 2: producer sign-off recorded

---

## Smoke Test Scope (run `/smoke-check` before any QA hand-off)

Critical paths to verify before batch 1 closure:

1. **Unity Editor launches; no compile errors; no new "missing script" warnings beyond pre-existing `StructureHealth` / `FX_BlueBuff_Normal_Attack_Base` baseline** (overnoob `ลบ script` commit `e2775a38fb` 2026-04-23 — known issue, NOT a regression of this work)
2. **PrototypeTest.unity → Play**: `[Multipeer-Parity] ✅ PASS #4` log within 5s (BUG-0005 fix `eb1c4ea695` regression guard)
3. **scene_initial → Play → game_map**: production flow reaches `scene_game_map.unity` Map Loaded callback (BUG-0005 retry-stall regression guard)
4. **Hercules baseline**: load Hercules in Training match, Q/W/E/R + Recall + Item functional, **0** BindSlot warnings, **0** StateReleaseSlot slot=0 warnings (Phase 2 pilot regression guard)
5. **Each migrated Phase 3 hero (when implemented)**: load in Training match, all abilities functional, BindSlot warnings = 0, StateReleaseSlot slot=0 = 0
6. **Multipeer bandwidth budget**: Pass #5 client out ≤ 2048 B/s idle, ≤65 B/s ability-channel for all 4 heroes
7. **Performance budget**: no new frame spikes beyond Sprint 005 baseline (visual inspection of Stats overlay during 1-match)

**Reference**: BUG-0005 `eb1c4ea695` introduces runtime PeerMode toggle — smoke test step 2+3 catches regressions if the toggle / restore logic ever breaks.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|---------------|--------------|--------------------|
| S6-03 Horus | Verify 5 abilities feel correct, no animation glitches, BUG-0001 cousin (HorusE/HorusR) verified | 1 (Training mode) | Experienced (developer playtest) |
| S6-04 Volund | Verify 5 abilities + VolundW (largest) feel correct; BUG-0001 cousin (VolundW) verified | 1 | Experienced |
| S6-05 Guan Yu | Verify 6 abilities incl. N-action TD-006 path; BUG-0001 cousin (GuanYuE) verified | 1 | Experienced |
| S6-06 Skadi | Verify 5 abilities (clean baseline); velocity baseline logged | 1 | Experienced |
| S6-07 Batch gate | Verify all 4 heroes together; go/no-go for batch 2 | 1 combined or 4 separate | Experienced + (optional) qa-tester |

**Total: 4-5 short Training-mode sessions across batch 1.**

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be appended to `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` per hero, with gameplay-programmer + qa-tester sign-off before each story is marked Complete via `/story-done`.

If qa-tester is unavailable during batch 1 sprint window: gameplay-programmer self-signs with explicit note "single-reviewer; qa-tester async review pending" — flagged for follow-up but does not block story close.

---

## Definition of Done — Phase 3 Batch 1 Stories

A batch 1 story (S6-03 through S6-06) is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via Console log scrape, multipeer harness output, OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Evidence section appended to `production/qa/evidence/sprint-006-phase-3-batch1.md` with per-ability checklist + sign-off
- [ ] Multipeer Pass #1-5 evidence captured at `production/qa/evidence/S6-0X-multipeer.txt`
- [ ] BUG-0001 cousin verification logged (S6-03/04/05 only; S6-06 N/A)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` if applied; otherwise manual smoke steps 1-7 above)
- [ ] No new regressions in Hercules (control hero)
- [ ] PR description includes code-audit findings (pattern counts pre/post, hardcoded SkillKey counts)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or peer review in PR comments)
- [ ] Story file `Status` field updated to `Complete` via `/story-done`

S6-07 batch gate is DONE when all 4 hero stories above are DONE + combined batch playtest + producer go/no-go for batch 2 recorded.

---

## Notes on test infrastructure

- **EditMode tests are optional for batch 1** (AC #8 of each story). If batch 2 (S7) adopts per-hero test class convention, this plan should be updated.
- **PlayMode tests** (the S6-13 NetworkRunnerFixture spike) — not yet scaled to first domain NetworkBehaviour. Sprint 007 follow-up (`S7-PROPOSED-PLAYMODE-SCALING`) is the gate for when PlayMode tests become an option for hero migrations.
- **Manual Console-log inspection** is the primary signal for BindSlot pipeline verification (TD-007 cousin guard) and StateReleaseSlot routing (TD-006 cousin guard). Both are CI-visible if/when test framework expands.
- **BUG-0005 regression guard**: the runtime PeerMode toggle in `AbilityMultipeerRunner.cs` (commit `eb1c4ea695`) must be intact for batch 1 multipeer verification to work. If smoke step 2 fails, check that file before suspecting hero-specific issues.
